DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $412.50 PLUS $60.00 IN FILING FEES FOR A TOTAL OF $472.50. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT THE ORDER. DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE MATTER IS SUBMITTED ON THE TENTATIVE AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KONSTANTIN TSAPLIN'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT REQUEST FOR ADMISSION SET ONE DEEMED ADMITTED IS GRANTED. THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS - SET ONE SERVED ON PLAINTIFF ROUSDEM DJORAEV ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. THE UNCONTROVERTED EVIDENCE PROVIDED BY A DECLARATION UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY BY WENDY BENJAMIN IS THAT, AS OF NOVEMBER 8TH, PLAINTIFF ROUSDEM DJORAEV HAS NEVER SIGNED A VERIFICATION OF THE JOINT RESPONSE TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS. SANCTIONS ARE GRANTED PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 2033.280(C) IN THE AMOUNT OF $550.00 PLUS $60.00 FOR MOTION FILING FEES. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT THE ORDER. ERNST HALPERIN, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS ROUSDEM DJORAEV & ALEXANDRE PRISAJNI'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT CANNOT ADDRESS THE MERITS OF THIS CASE BECAUSE THERE IS NO ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE REGARDING THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, AND THE COURT WILL NOT CONSIDER NEW EVIDENCE FIRST FILED ON REPLY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFs ROUSDEM DJORAEV & ALEXANDRE PRISAJNI'S Motion To Enforce Settlement IS Denied without prejudice. The Court cannot address the merits of this case because there is no admissible evidence regarding the terms of the settlement agreement, and the Court will not consider new evidence first filed on reply. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Konstantin Tsaplin'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set No One And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

Konstantin Tsaplin's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set No One And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No One And For Monetary Sanctions is off calendar. Notice of Settlement filed on November 9, 2012. James Watson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Mtn To Compel Response To Form Interoggs Set One
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
John E. Stringer, 415.934.1827, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: The matter is submitted on the tentative as follows: DEFENDANT KONSTANTIN TSAPLIN'S Motion To Compel Response To Form Interoggatories Set One is GRANTED, Plaintiffs Rousdem Djoraev and Alexandre Prisajni shall provide verified responses Defendant Konstatin Tsaplin's Form Interrogatories - Set One within 15 days. Defendant's request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $412.50 plus $60.00 in filing fees for a total of $472.50. Prevailing party is to submit the order. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Ptlfs' Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set No One And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
John E. Stringer, 415.934.1827, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: The matter is submitted on the tentative as follows: DEFENDANT KONSTANTIN TSAPLIN'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set No One And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No One And For Monetary Sanctions is continued to November 20, 2012 to give movant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. No later than 4 p.m., November 13th, movant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date of November 20th, or the motion will be denied. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Mtn For Order That Req For Admission Set One Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
John E. Stringer, 415.934.1827, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: The matter is submitted on the tentative as follows: DEFENDANT KONSTANTIN TSAPLIN'S Motion For Order That Request For Admission Set One Deemed Admitted is GRANTED. The requests for admissions - set one served on plaintiff Rousdem Djoraev are DEEMED ADMITTED. The uncontroverted evidence provided by a declaration under penalty of perjury by Wendy Benjamin is that, as of November 8th, Plaintiff Rousdem Djoraev has never signed a verification of the joint response to the Requests for Admissions. Sanctions are granted pursuant to C.C.P. 2033.280(c) in the amount of $550.00 plus $60.00 for motion filing fees. Prevailing party is to submit the order. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
